name: Argentine Corn Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove skin from chicken.
2. Season with salt and pepper.
3. In a large non-stick skillet, heat oil over medium heat.
4. Cook chicken until tender, turning occasionally for 15 to 20 minutes.
5. Remove chicken and keep warm.
6. Sauté onions and garlic in the skillet.
7. Add tomatoes, bay leaf, and marjoram; simmer for 10 minutes.
8. Add corn and chicken back into the skillet; heat through and mix well with the sauce.
9. Serve this dish with "Bell Pepper Salad" (also in this file).
Food Exchange per serving: 3 LOW/FAT MEAT EXCHANGES + 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE
Calories: 246; Protein: 27g; Carbohydrates: 18g; Fiber: 10g;
Sodium: 138mg
